ramp.note: Graphite Muted — secondary labels, ≥7:1 vs bg
Ash Ink — primary text, ≥12:1 vs bg
SkillBadge B text, StatusBadge in-use text

motion.reducedMotion: MotionConfig reducedMotion='user' wraps all animated sections; globals.css resets animation-duration to 0.01ms on prefers-reduced-motion: reduce

shadows.note: All cards and panels are flat at rest — no shadows. Only focus rings use glow. Shadow on a resting card is a bug.

tapTargets.note: Courtside use demands 44×44px minimum. All interactive elements must meet this. Primary session actions (Start, End, Assign) at 44px min-height.

button-primary.description: Full copper fill — the single primary action in any screen region
button-primary.css: :host { --color-primary: oklch(0.71 0.17 38); --color-primary-hover: oklch(0.76 0.16 38); --color-bg: oklch(0.09 0 0); } .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.25rem; width: 100%; padding: 10px 12px; background: var(--color-primary); color: var(--color-bg); border: none; border-radius: 8px; font-family: 'Space Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: var(--color-primary-hover); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { background: oklch(0.18 0.004 38); color: oklch(0.62 0.006 38); cursor: not-allowed; opacity: 0.6; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px oklch(0.71 0.17 38 / 50%); }

button-ghost.description: Borderless secondary action — Add, Cancel, nav controls
button-ghost.html: <button class="ds-btn-ghost"><svg width="11" height="11"><!-- Plus icon --></svg> Add</button>
button-ghost.css: :host { --color-muted: oklch(0.62 0.006 38); --color-ink: oklch(0.94 0.005 38); --color-surface-elevated: oklch(0.18 0.004 38); --color-border: oklch(0.28 0.006 38); } .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.25rem; padding: 6px 8px; background: transparent; border: 1px solid oklch(0.28 0.006 38 / 60%); border-radius: 4px; color: var(--color-muted); font-family: 'Space Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; cursor: pointer; transition: color 150ms, background 150ms; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { color: var(--color-ink); background: var(--color-surface-elevated); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px oklch(0.28 0.006 38); }

button-destructive.description: Error-tinted button for destructive confirm states
button-destructive.css: :host { --color-error: oklch(0.62 0.21 25); } .ds-btn-destructive { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; padding: 8px 10px; background: oklch(0.62 0.21 25 / 15%); color: var(--color-error); border: none; border-radius: 4px; font-family: 'Space Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms; } .ds-btn-destructive:hover { background: oklch(0.62 0.21 25 / 25%); } .ds-btn-destructive:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px oklch(0.62 0.21 25 / 40%); }

skill-badge.description: 20×20px rank indicator. 7 levels: S=copper, A=copper/80, B=slate, C-F=muted
skill-badge.html: SABC
skill-badge.css: .ds-skill-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 20px; height: 20px; border-radius: 4px; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-skill-badge--s { background: oklch(0.71 0.17 38 / 20%); color: oklch(0.71 0.17 38); border: 1px solid oklch(0.71 0.17 38 / 30%); } .ds-skill-badge--a { background: oklch(0.71 0.17 38 / 12%); color: oklch(0.71 0.17 38 / 80%); } .ds-skill-badge--b { background: oklch(0.62 0.14 220 / 12%); color: oklch(0.62 0.14 220); } .ds-skill-badge--c { background: oklch(0.94 0.005 38 / 8%); color: oklch(0.62 0.006 38 / 60%); } .ds-skill-badge--d, .ds-skill-badge--e, .ds-skill-badge--f { background: oklch(0.94 0.005 38 / 6%); color: oklch(0.62 0.006 38); }

status-badge.description: Pill-shaped semantic state label. 10 variants keyed by meaning.
status-badge.html: AvailableIn UseUnpaidOpen
status-badge.css: .ds-status-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 9999px; font-family: 'Space Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.5; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-status-badge--available, .ds-status-badge--paid { background: oklch(0.65 0.17 145 / 15%); color: oklch(0.65 0.17 145); } .ds-status-badge--in-use, .ds-status-badge--in-progress { background: oklch(0.62 0.14 220 / 15%); color: oklch(0.62 0.14 220); } .ds-status-badge--open { background: oklch(0.71 0.17 38 / 15%); color: oklch(0.71 0.17 38); } .ds-status-badge--completed, .ds-status-badge--closed, .ds-status-badge--waived { background: oklch(0.18 0.004 38); color: oklch(0.62 0.006 38); } .ds-status-badge--voided { background: oklch(0.62 0.21 25 / 10%); color: oklch(0.62 0.21 25); } .ds-status-badge--unpaid { background: oklch(0.75 0.14 75 / 15%); color: oklch(0.75 0.14 75); }

player-chip.description: Compact player token inside PlanningCard. Tap to select for swap; × to remove.
player-chip.css: .ds-player-chip-wrap { position: relative; display: inline-block; } .ds-player-chip { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; width: 100%; padding: 6px; border: none; border-radius: 4px; background: transparent; cursor: pointer; transition: background 100ms; } .ds-player-chip:hover { background: oklch(0.18 0.004 38); } .ds-player-chip[aria-pressed='true'] { background: oklch(0.71 0.17 38 / 12%); box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px oklch(0.71 0.17 38 / 40%); } .ds-player-chip__name { font-family: 'Space Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; color: oklch(0.94 0.005 38); white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; flex: 1; min-width: 0; } .ds-player-chip__remove { position: absolute; top: -4px; right: -4px; width: 14px; height: 14px; background: oklch(0.18 0.004 38); border: 1px solid oklch(0.28 0.006 38); border-radius: 9999px; color: oklch(0.62 0.006 38); font-size: 8px; line-height: 1; cursor: pointer; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; opacity: 0; transition: opacity 100ms, color 100ms, border-color 100ms; } .ds-player-chip-wrap:hover .ds-player-chip__remove, .ds-player-chip__remove:focus-visible { opacity: 1; } .ds-player-chip__remove:hover { color: oklch(0.62 0.21 25); border-color: oklch(0.62 0.21 25 / 40%); } @media (hover: none) { .ds-player-chip__remove { opacity: 1; } }

player-row.description: Queue/bench list item. 44px min-height. Grip + position + name + SkillBadge + game count + hover controls.
player-row.html: 1AlexA3g
player-row.css: .ds-player-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 8px 12px; min-height: 44px; border-bottom: 1px solid oklch(0.28 0.006 38 / 40%); cursor: grab; transition: background 150ms; } .ds-player-row:hover { background: oklch(0.18 0.004 38 / 40%); } .ds-player-row:active { cursor: grabbing; } .ds-player-row__grip { color: oklch(0.62 0.006 38 / 60%); flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-player-row:hover .ds-player-row__grip { color: oklch(0.62 0.006 38 / 80%); } .ds-player-row__pos { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 10px; color: oklch(0.62 0.006 38); width: 20px; text-align: right; flex-shrink: 0; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; } .ds-player-row__name { font-family: 'Space Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; color: oklch(0.94 0.005 38); flex: 1; min-width: 0; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-player-row__games { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 10px; color: oklch(0.62 0.006 38); flex-shrink: 0; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; } .ds-player-row__controls { display: flex; align-items: center; opacity: 0; transition: opacity 150ms; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-player-row:hover .ds-player-row__controls { opacity: 1; } @media (hover: none) { .ds-player-row__controls { opacity: 1; } }

planning-card-footer.description: The inline court picker cross-fade inside PlanningCard footer. AnimatePresence mode=wait between assign button and picker expanded state.
planning-card-footer.html: Assign to court:
planning-card-footer.css: .ds-card-footer { padding: 8px 12px 12px; border-top: 1px solid oklch(0.28 0.006 38 / 60%); } .ds-card-footer__picker-label { font-family: 'Space Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 10px; color: oklch(0.62 0.006 38); margin-bottom: 8px; } .ds-card-footer__courts { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 4px; margin-bottom: 8px; } .ds-court-btn { padding: 6px 10px; background: oklch(0.71 0.17 38 / 10%); color: oklch(0.71 0.17 38); border: none; border-radius: 4px; font-family: 'Space Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms, color 150ms; } .ds-court-btn:hover { background: oklch(0.71 0.17 38); color: oklch(0.09 0 0); } .ds-card-footer__cancel { font-family: 'Space Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 10px; color: oklch(0.62 0.006 38); background: none; border: none; cursor: pointer; padding: 0; transition: color 150ms; } .ds-card-footer__cancel:hover { color: oklch(0.94 0.005 38); } [hidden] { display: none !important; }

payment-toggle.description: 3-segment inline control for the manual payment ledger. One tap sets the exact state — Paid (success), Unpaid (neutral default), Waived (primary-tinted, deliberately distinct from Paid).
payment-toggle.css: .ds-payment-toggle { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 2px; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid oklch(0.28 0.006 38 / 60%); background: oklch(0.09 0 0); padding: 2px; } .ds-payment-seg { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 24px; padding: 0 8px; border: none; border-radius: 4px; background: transparent; color: oklch(0.62 0.006 38); font-family: 'Space Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 600; white-space: nowrap; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms, color 150ms; } .ds-payment-seg:hover { color: oklch(0.94 0.005 38); background: oklch(0.18 0.004 38); } .ds-payment-seg:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px oklch(0.71 0.17 38 / 50%); } .ds-payment-seg--paid-active { background: oklch(0.65 0.17 145 / 15%); color: oklch(0.65 0.17 145); } .ds-payment-seg--unpaid-active { background: oklch(0.18 0.004 38); color: oklch(0.94 0.005 38); border: 1px solid oklch(0.28 0.006 38); } .ds-payment-seg--waived-active { background: oklch(0.71 0.17 38 / 12%); color: oklch(0.71 0.17 38); }

toast-undo.description: The one notification shape every reversible action in the app uses — never a per-feature toast design. Check icon + message + optional divider + Undo. 5000ms/alert when undoable, 2500ms/status otherwise.
toast-undo.html: Removed from session
toast-undo.css: .ds-toast { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 10px 16px; background: oklch(0.18 0.004 38); border: 1px solid oklch(0.28 0.006 38); border-radius: 9999px; color: oklch(0.94 0.005 38); font-family: 'Space Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; white-space: nowrap; box-shadow: 0 10px 30px oklch(0 0 0 / 0.3); } .ds-toast__check { color: oklch(0.65 0.17 145); flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-toast__divider { width: 1px; height: 12px; background: oklch(0.28 0.006 38); margin: 0 2px; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-toast__undo { padding: 0 4px; margin: 0 -4px; border: none; border-radius: 4px; background: transparent; color: oklch(0.71 0.17 38); font-family: inherit; font-size: inherit; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: color 150ms; } .ds-toast__undo:hover { color: oklch(0.76 0.16 38); } .ds-toast__undo:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px oklch(0.71 0.17 38 / 50%); }
